verdict.rationale: The claim's 13.51M matches the finance pack Q2 2026 actual (v1 and v2, authority_rank 1), but the Q2 2026 quarterly update prose states the qualified pipeline 'stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter' — a competing same-entity, same-period (Q2 2026 close) value with no explicit supersession or reconciliation in either document; authority_rank alone cannot resolve it. The regional 'Qualified commercial pipeline' (13.053M) is a narrower commercial subset, a scope difference rather than a competing figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the 0.25M gap between the finance pack (13.510M) and the Q2 2026 quarterly update prose (13.26M) for the qualified pipeline — determine whether the prose reflects a preliminary figure later revised, and document which is authoritative for Q2 2026.

evidence.span_text: The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter.

final_text:
I have what I need. The finance pack (v1 and v2, both authority_rank 1) reports Q2 2026 actual = 13.510M, matching the claim. But the Q2 2026 quarterly update (prose, authority_rank 8) states "The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter" — which, per the "entering a subsequent period" rule, is the snapshot at the Q2 2026 close, a competing same-period/same-entity value. No explicit supersession or reconciliation exists in either document. The regional "Qualified commercial pipeline" (13.053M) is a narrower commercial subset, a scope difference rather than a competing same-scope figure.
